title: claytonia tenuifolia
intro: Claytonia tenuifolia, also known as seabolt or sandwort, is a perennial plant native to the western coastal regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Claytonia tenuifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Claytonia tenuifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried herb to be used in various herbal preparations.
